channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Log audit costs without breaking compliance
item.description: Cut audit log costs 40%: PostgreSQL vs ClickHouse at 2026 scale — 9 800 events/sec, 28 ms queries, and the write amplification trap most teams miss.

item.title: Why RAG alone fails 2026 search
item.description: Cut search latency 50% and costs 70% with hybrid BM25 + reranker — DistilBERT-base-uncased-distilled + ONNX Runtime 1.17 on a $5 VPS in 2026.

item.title: 3 WCAG traps in AI chat UIs
item.description: Cut screen-reader announcement errors 78% in AI chat widgets with scoped live regions, DOMPurify 3.0.6, and Safari iframe fixes.

item.title: USSD in 2026: Africa's silent infra layer
item.description: USSD delivers 1.2 million transactions/hour in Africa — here’s how to plug it into your 2026 fintech stack for 94% loan completion rates on 2G networks

item.title: Rewrite monolith without disaster: 2026’s safe path
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by extracting services incrementally — why big-bang rewrites fail in 2026’s distributed stacks and the safer path teams actually use.

item.title: AI codebases: guardrails vs chaos in 2026
item.description: Cut AI-generated bugs 70% with guardrails — ESLint, AST checks, and human gates that work on $3k/month AWS budgets in 2026

item.title: Hiring engineers: the 3 things AI cares about now
item.description: Cut engineering interview time 51% with AI probes that measure time-to-first-insight — not keywords. 62% fewer incidents, 78% more onsite candidates, and the real code that made it work.

item.title: AI solo SaaS: build vs buy agents in 2026
item.description: Cut solo SaaS launch time from 72 days to 18 days using CrewAI v0.25 — learn when to build your own agent loop and when to buy the runtime, with real latency, cost, and code samples from 2026.

item.title: 5 notification systems ranked: push, email, SMS
item.description: Cut notification delivery time 40% and costs 30% with Courier v2.18 — compare push, email, SMS, and WhatsApp systems with real latency, cost, and bounce data.

item.title: AI proof your salary: the 3 skills worth 40% more
item.description: Cut AI replacement risk by 40% with these 3 skills: schema contracts, blast radius metrics, and runtime kill switches. Real-world fixes for Copilot PRs and agent spirals in 2026.

item.title: 50 locations, 50 headaches: edge-native backends in
item.description: Cut API latency 60 % by running your backend in 50 locations — connection pooling, replication lag, and the $12k mistake most teams make in 2026.

item.title: Meet 2026 SBOM demands in minutes
item.description: Generate SBOMs in 20 mins with Syft 1.11 to meet 2026 compliance — no manual mapping, 95% time saved, SPDX 2.3 ready

item.title: Fintech APIs broke in Nigeria — here’s why
item.description: Cut fintech API response time 50% and pass CBN audits — how Nigerian APIs broke in 2025 and what to do in 2026

item.title: Attack AI systems before users do
item.description: Cut prompt injection incidents 86% with LlamaGuard-2-8B and a document sanitizer — the real costs, latency figures, and the retrieval poisoning attack teams miss in 2026.

item.title: LLM evals: skip the hype, track these 4 metrics
item.description: Cut hallucinations 74% and latency 52% using 4 production metrics — not BLEU or perplexity. Real code, real AWS services, real ROI.

item.title: AI hallucinations expose blind spots
item.description: Cut hallucinations 64% by tracking prompt and embedding drift — concrete numbers, code, and the hidden costs most teams miss when moving AI to production in 2026.

item.title: Replace alert noise in 2026
item.description: Cut nighttime pages 78% with PagerDuty alert triage in 2026 — AI suppression rules, LangChain prompts, and real cost numbers from a production rollout.

item.title: WireGuard vs Tailscale for $5/month zero trust
item.description: Cut breach risk 80% with zero-trust for $60/year — Tailscale vs WireGuard on latency, cost, and DX in 2026

item.title: Platform engineering: what our IDPs really cost in 2026
item.description: AWS EKS clusters cost $72 per node per month in 2026 for m6g.xlarge instances, and if your platform team runs 150 nodes across dev, staging, and prod…

item.title: Price SaaS dev tools in 2026 without guessing
item.description: 2026 pricing playbook for dev tools with real MRR, Stripe limits, and AWS costs — seat-based vs usage-based, seat limits, and the $49 plan surprise.
